10636501.title: Call the Midwife
10636501.description: The team tries to unite an estranged mother and daughter who are both pregnant. Also, Trixie's friend is devastated to discover she is pregnant.

10637473.title: Summer of Rockets
10637473.description: Hannah arrives at Buckingham Palace, but is too late to be presented. Samuel meets two men who are interested in his invention: Denning and Mr Field. He learns that they are from MI5 and he is sworn to secrecy, and the Petrukhins attend a fete at the Shaw's.

10638449.title: Father Brown
10638449.description: The Kembleford Ramblers' annual outing takes a tragic turn for the worst when the local lord is found strangled.

10638597.title: Call the Midwife
10638597.description: The team tries to unite an estranged mother and daughter who are both pregnant. Also, Trixie's friend is devastated to discover she is pregnant.

10639570.title: Summer of Rockets
10639570.description: Hannah arrives at Buckingham Palace, but is too late to be presented. Samuel meets two men who are interested in his invention: Denning and Mr Field. He learns that they are from MI5 and he is sworn to secrecy, and the Petrukhins attend a fete at the Shaw's.

10640521.title: Mary Berry Cooks
10640521.description: Mary Berry is cooking dishes for a family celebration. She makes it seem almost effortless, with recipes for beef and mushroom stew with mustard mash, salmon en croûte with a foolproof salad, and chocolate and orange panna cotta.

10641409.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
10641409.description: Frank and Lu investigate a case of culinary sabotage when a restaurant owner accuses a food critic of giving him an undeserved bad review.

10641573.title: Bargain Hunt
10641573.description: Eric Knowles presents from the grounds of Kedleston Hall in Derbyshire with experts Danny Sebastian and Jonathan Pratt. Two sets of mums and daughters battle it out to buy three items that will hopefully make a profit at auction, while Eric finds out about Derby's industrial heritage.

10642507.title: Bad Move
10642507.description: Nicky and Steve are alarmed to discover that an ancient public right of way runs through their garden. Grizzo is preoccupied with a new tapping craze.

10642626.title: Keeping Up Appearances
10642626.description: Hyacinth still wants to join Emmet's production of `The Boyfriend', but fortunately for him, other things have to take priority.

10643528.title: Doctors
10643528.description: It's Valerie's 50th birthday and a celebrity is in town. When their plans go awry, Emma and Luca find themselves sharing more than they expect.

10644406.title: EastEnders
10644406.description: Sonia lets her guard down as Nancy and Frankie meddle in Shirley's love life. Tiffany's insecurities cause her to make a snap decision. Callum feels helpless, and Jean has some advice for Ruby, who feels like giving up.

10644505.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
10644505.description: Frank and Lu investigate a case of culinary sabotage when a restaurant owner accuses a food critic of giving him an undeserved bad review.

10645431.title: Bargain Hunt
10645431.description: Eric Knowles presents from the grounds of Kedleston Hall in Derbyshire with experts Danny Sebastian and Jonathan Pratt. Two sets of mums and daughters battle it out to buy three items that will hopefully make a profit at auction, while Eric finds out about Derby's industrial heritage.

10645611.title: Impossible
10645611.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

10646502.title: Antiques Roadshow
10646502.description: The team is at Buckfast Abbey, a Benedictine monastery on the edge of Dartmoor in Devon. Finds include a glorious tiara, a teddy bear with an intriguing secret, and a silver platter that is not all that it seems.

10647461.title: Bad Move
10647461.description: Nicky and Steve are alarmed to discover that an ancient public right of way runs through their garden. Grizzo is preoccupied with a new tapping craze.

10647581.title: Keeping Up Appearances
10647581.description: Hyacinth still wants to join Emmet's production of `The Boyfriend', but fortunately for him, other things have to take priority.

10648399.title: Bargain Hunt
10648399.description: Anita Manning presents from Hemswell Antiques Centre in Lincolnshire with experts Christina Trevanion and Nick Hall. There is magic in the air as a magician and his assistant take on a mother and daughter to buy three items that will hopefully make a profit at auction.

10648597.title: Doctors
10648597.description: It's Valerie's 50th birthday and a celebrity is in town. When their plans go awry, Emma and Luca find themselves sharing more than they expect.

10649442.title: EastEnders
10649442.description: Sonia lets her guard down as Nancy and Frankie meddle in Shirley's love life. Tiffany's insecurities cause her to make a snap decision. Callum feels helpless, and Jean has some advice for Ruby, who feels like giving up.

10649534.title: Impossible
10649534.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

10650469.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
10650469.description: Frank and Lu must recover a precious jewel and a rebellious teenager before midnight strikes at Lady Bede's End of Summer Ball.

10651357.title: Antiques Roadshow
10651357.description: The team is at Buckfast Abbey, a Benedictine monastery on the edge of Dartmoor in Devon. Finds include a glorious tiara, a teddy bear with an intriguing secret, and a silver platter that is not all that it seems.

10651567.title: Bad Move
10651567.description: Nicky and Steve are missing the city, and fantasise about all the exciting things they could be doing before both experience a bizarre and unusual day.

10652431.title: Keeping Up Appearances
10652431.description: When Hyacinth decides that a new car is in order, she aims rather higher than most people - much to Richard's horror.

10652545.title: Doctors
10652545.description: It's Valerie's 50th birthday and a celebrity is in town. When their plans go awry, Emma and Luca find themselves sharing more than they expect.

10653443.title: EastEnders
10653443.description: Sonia lets her guard down as Nancy and Frankie meddle in Shirley's love life. Tiffany's insecurities cause her to make a snap decision. Callum feels helpless, and Jean has some advice for Ruby, who feels like giving up.

10653534.title: Impossible
10653534.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

10654495.title: Mary Berry Cooks
10654495.description: Mary Berry is cooking dishes for a family celebration. She makes it seem almost effortless, with recipes for beef and mushroom stew with mustard mash, salmon en croûte with a foolproof salad, and chocolate and orange panna cotta.

10655370.title: Paul Hollywood: A Baker's Life
10655370.description: Paul Hollywood returns to his Merseyside roots and family, with ginger biscuits, coconut tray bake, millionaire's shortbread, and his dad's floury baps on the menu.

10655486.title: Doctors
10655486.description: Valerie tries to track down the baby from the photo in the mystery box. A new sergeant joins the station, but Rob isn't too happy about it. Jimmi tries to help a young lad with a stammer who has vital information for the police but is struggling to share it.

10656363.title: EastEnders
10656363.description: Sharon's comments leave Kat feeling uncertain. Tiffany tries to cover her mistake, Rocky pulls out all the stops for Sonia, and Ben makes a discovery.

10656423.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
10656423.description: Tracking a local conman, Frank and Lu make some unlikely allies when they encounter a pair of deadly gangsters.

10657365.title: Silent Witness
10657365.description: The Lyell team investigate the shooting of a family who were picnicking by a river.

10658547.title: Father Brown
10658547.description: When Lady Felicia's home comes under threat due to a diamond that she refused to sell to a Russian, Father Brown must seek help from an unlikely ally.
